records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Administration Mobile Strategic HQ
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Administration Mobile Strategic HQ
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Administration Direct Control City, <color=#ffd34c>Charade</color> Administration Mobile Strategic HQ

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I owe Charade an apology for this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I owe Charade an apology for this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I owe Charade an apology for this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never imagined the Category 6 C.O. that descended on that city would head straight for Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never imagined the Category 6 C.O. that descended on that city would head straight for Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never imagined the Category 6 C.O. that descended on that city would head straight for Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We did everything we could, but we had no means to oppose a Category 6 C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We did everything we could, but we had no means to oppose a Category 6 C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We did everything we could, but we had no means to oppose a Category 6 C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, Front Bay failed to stop the omen phenomenon, and the city was swallowed by roots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, Front Bay failed to stop the omen phenomenon, and the city was swallowed by roots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, Front Bay failed to stop the omen phenomenon, and the city was swallowed by roots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that situation, the best we could do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that situation, the best we could do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that situation, the best we could do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...was to pass on the unused Track Switcher and the Golden Vale's Legacy to the next city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...was to pass on the unused Track Switcher and the Golden Vale's Legacy to the next city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...was to pass on the unused Track Switcher and the Golden Vale's Legacy to the next city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that's why the Track Switcher arrived earlier than expected?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that's why the Track Switcher arrived earlier than expected?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that's why the Track Switcher arrived earlier than expected?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. At Coach's request, we transported the Track Switcher to Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. At Coach's request, we transported the Track Switcher to Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. At Coach's request, we transported the Track Switcher to Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to your sacrifice, we have secured enough Eternium to operate the Track Switcher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to your sacrifice, we have secured enough Eternium to operate the Track Switcher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to your sacrifice, we have secured enough Eternium to operate the Track Switcher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allow me to express my gratitude here, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allow me to express my gratitude here, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allow me to express my gratitude here, Ozymandias.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What sacrifice? I'm not dead, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What sacrifice? I'm not dead, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What sacrifice? I'm not dead, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So anyway, a Hollow God, huh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So anyway, a Hollow God, huh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So anyway, a Hollow God, huh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feels like just yesterday I almost died fighting that damn monster, and now we're doing it again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feels like just yesterday I almost died fighting that damn monster, and now we're doing it again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feels like just yesterday I almost died fighting that damn monster, and now we're doing it again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've confirmed the location of the Guardian of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've confirmed the location of the Guardian of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've confirmed the location of the Guardian of Sephira.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Judging by its movement path so far, it's going to collide with the Track Switcher deployment site.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Judging by its movement path so far, it's going to collide with the Track Switcher deployment site.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Judging by its movement path so far, it's going to collide with the Track Switcher deployment site.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, we won't be able to avoid a fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, we won't be able to avoid a fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, we won't be able to avoid a fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. We must not avoid it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. We must not avoid it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. We must not avoid it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to eliminate it first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to eliminate it first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to eliminate it first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Category 6 C.O.s attract other Category 6 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Category 6 C.O.s attract other Category 6 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Category 6 C.O.s attract other Category 6 C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we leave them alone, this world will eventually collapse under the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we leave them alone, this world will eventually collapse under the Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we leave them alone, this world will eventually collapse under the Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And for some reason...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And for some reason...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And for some reason...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...the Hollow God we saw earlier was far larger than the one we fought before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...the Hollow God we saw earlier was far larger than the one we fought before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...the Hollow God we saw earlier was far larger than the one we fought before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was bigger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was bigger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was bigger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most likely because it absorbed this world's possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most likely because it absorbed this world's possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most likely because it absorbed this world's possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the more possibilities it absorbs, the stronger it will become.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the more possibilities it absorbs, the stronger it will become.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the more possibilities it absorbs, the stronger it will become.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've got to be kidding me. I almost died already, and it's still getting stronger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've got to be kidding me. I almost died already, and it's still getting stronger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've got to be kidding me. I almost died already, and it's still getting stronger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said you've fought a Category 6 C.O. before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said you've fought a Category 6 C.O. before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said you've fought a Category 6 C.O. before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you deal with it back then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you deal with it back then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you deal with it back then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was able to neutralize the Hollow God with my gear, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was able to neutralize the Hollow God with my gear, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was able to neutralize the Hollow God with my gear, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ultimately, we needed Mina's Wolvesbane to bring it down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ultimately, we needed Mina's Wolvesbane to bring it down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ultimately, we needed Mina's Wolvesbane to bring it down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Mina is currently in Ground One, so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Mina is currently in Ground One, so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Mina is currently in Ground One, so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what, there's nothing we can do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what, there's nothing we can do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what, there's nothing we can do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Track Switcher or not, we're all dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Track Switcher or not, we're all dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Track Switcher or not, we're all dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This operation was devised by the Supreme Administrator, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This operation was devised by the Supreme Administrator, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This operation was devised by the Supreme Administrator, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe I understand what kind of <color=#ffd34c>countermeasure</color> he arranged.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe I understand what kind of <color=#ffd34c>countermeasure</color> he arranged.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe I understand what kind of <color=#ffd34c>countermeasure</color> he arranged.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really, Lamda?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really, Lamda?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really, Lamda?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what is this countermeasure? Tell me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what is this countermeasure? Tell me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what is this countermeasure? Tell me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We endure with everything we have until a <color=#ffd34c>solution</color> appears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We endure with everything we have until a <color=#ffd34c>solution</color> appears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We endure with everything we have until a <color=#ffd34c>solution</color> appears.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, don't tell me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, don't tell me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, don't tell me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. Endure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. Endure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. Endure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator is someone worthy of trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator is someone worthy of trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator is someone worthy of trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he made preparations, then there must be meaning behind it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he made preparations, then there must be meaning behind it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he made preparations, then there must be meaning behind it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if simply enduring can resolve this, then I will endure as long as it takes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if simply enduring can resolve this, then I will endure as long as it takes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if simply enduring can resolve this, then I will endure as long as it takes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hear me! All who have joined forces to protect this city!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hear me! All who have joined forces to protect this city!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hear me! All who have joined forces to protect this city!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your origins differ, even if the lives you've lived are not the same...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your origins differ, even if the lives you've lived are not the same...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your origins differ, even if the lives you've lived are not the same...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if your affiliations, beliefs, and faiths are different...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if your affiliations, beliefs, and faiths are different...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if your affiliations, beliefs, and faiths are different...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this moment, cast aside personal motives and unite your strength!
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this moment, cast aside personal motives and unite your strength!
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this moment, cast aside personal motives and unite your strength!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fight for the world, and for this city!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fight for the world, and for this city!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fight for the world, and for this city!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The vanguard shall be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The vanguard shall be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The vanguard shall be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Us, the Zodiac Knights...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Us, the Zodiac Knights...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Us, the Zodiac Knights...!
